title: Influencer Radar
description: Social media posts scraped from YouTube and Reddit, classified by topic relevance and engagement

posts.description: Scraped posts from YouTube and Reddit

authors.description: Content creators and their subscriber/karma counts

top_influencers.title: Top Influencers by Engagement
top_influencers.sql: SELECT a.author_name, a.platform, a.author_type, a.subscriber_count, COUNT(p.post_id) AS posts, SUM(p.views + p.likes) AS total_engagement FROM authors a JOIN posts p USING (platform, author_id) GROUP BY a.platform, a.author_id ORDER BY total_engagement DESC LIMIT 50

deep_technical_posts.title: Deep Technical Posts
deep_technical_posts.sql: SELECT p.title, p.url, p.views, p.likes, c.content_type, c.sentiment, a.author_name FROM posts p JOIN classifications c USING (platform, post_id) JOIN authors a USING (platform, author_id) WHERE c.technical_depth = 'deep-technical' ORDER BY p.views DESC

all_classified_posts.title: All Posts with Classifications
all_classified_posts.sql: SELECT p.title, p.url, p.platform, a.author_name, a.author_type, p.views, p.likes, p.published_at, c.technical_depth, c.content_type, c.sentiment, c.confidence FROM posts p JOIN classifications c USING (platform, post_id) JOIN authors a USING (platform, author_id) ORDER BY p.published_at DESC

sentiment_breakdown.title: Sentiment by Platform
sentiment_breakdown.sql: SELECT p.platform, c.sentiment, COUNT(*) AS count FROM classifications c JOIN posts p USING (platform, post_id) GROUP BY p.platform, c.sentiment ORDER BY p.platform, count DESC

official_vs_community.title: Official vs Community Authors
official_vs_community.sql: SELECT a.author_type, a.platform, COUNT(DISTINCT a.author_id) AS authors, COUNT(p.post_id) AS posts FROM authors a LEFT JOIN posts p USING (platform, author_id) GROUP BY a.author_type, a.platform ORDER BY a.author_type, a.platform

run_history.title: Scrape Run History
run_history.sql: SELECT id, run_at, topic_file, posts_scraped, influencers_found, platforms FROM runs ORDER BY run_at DESC
